zh.siteSubtitle: 奥地利哲学家·人智学创始人（1861-1925）
zh.homeIntro1: 鲁道夫·施泰纳（Rudolf Steiner，1861年2月27日—1925年3月30日），奥地利哲学家、社会改革家、建筑师、神秘学家。他创立了人智学（Anthroposophy），一种以灵性科学为核心的思想体系，影响了教育（华德福学校）、农业（生物动力农法）、医学和艺术等多个领域。
zh.homeIntro2: 施泰纳一生发表了超过6000场演讲，著作等身。他声称能够通过灵性感知直接观察超感官世界，并据此对人类文明的未来走向做出了大量预言。这些预言涉及战争、唯物主义的后果、科技对灵魂的侵蚀、医学的异化、以及人类灵性进化的关键转折点。
zh.homeIntro3: 施泰纳最引人注目的预言包括：准确预见了两次世界大战的爆发、警告唯物主义将导致灵魂的消亡、预言疫苗技术可能被用于切断人与灵性的联系、以及描述恶魔实体「阿里曼」将在21世纪初以人形降临。本站整理了他的核心预言，并对已到期的预言进行了验证评估。
zh.coreQuote: 「未来的唯物主义文明将寻求一种疫苗，通过注射使人从幼年起就丧失一切灵性倾向……他们将找到一种疫苗来对抗灵性倾向。」
keyPointsList: 1914年 —— 预见欧洲大陆将爆发毁灭性战争，文明面临根本性危机
1917年 —— 预言俄国革命及其对东方世界的深远影响
20世纪末 —— 唯物主义达到顶峰，人类灵性意识加速衰退
21世纪初 —— 阿里曼（恶魔实体）以人形化身降临西方世界
第三千年纪 —— 人类进入「光之时代」，灵性意识逐步觉醒
sourceList: 预言内容整理自施泰纳公开演讲记录与著作，主要来源为Rudolf Steiner Archive（rsarchive.org）
部分演讲引用来自《秘密科学大纲》《如何认识高层世界》等著作（著作目录）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道、历史记录和学术研究
编者观点不代表学术定论
站点图标采用玫瑰十字符号——施泰纳深受玫瑰十字会传统影响，玫瑰十字是人智学最具代表性的灵性符号

en.homeIntro1: Rudolf Steiner (February 27, 1861 – March 30, 1925) was an Austrian philosopher, social reformer, architect, and esotericist. He founded Anthroposophy, a spiritual-scientific worldview that influenced education (Waldorf schools), agriculture (biodynamic farming), medicine, and the arts.
en.homeIntro2: Steiner delivered over 6,000 lectures in his lifetime and authored numerous books. He claimed the ability to perceive supersensible realities directly through spiritual cognition, and based on these insights, he made extensive predictions about the future course of human civilization — covering wars, the consequences of materialism, technology's erosion of the soul, the corruption of medicine, and critical turning points in humanity's spiritual evolution.
en.homeIntro3: Steiner's most notable predictions include: accurately foreseeing both World Wars, warning that materialism would lead to the death of the soul, predicting that vaccine technology could be used to sever humanity's connection to the spiritual world, and describing the demonic entity 'Ahriman' incarnating in human form in the early 21st century. This site compiles his core prophecies and evaluates those whose deadlines have passed.
en.coreQuote: "The materialistic civilization of the future will seek a vaccine that will make the organism healthy by injection from earliest infancy, so that it cannot develop any inclination toward the spiritual life... They will find a vaccine against the disposition toward spirituality."
keyPointsList: 1914 —— Foresaw devastating war engulfing Europe, a fundamental civilizational crisis
1917 —— Predicted the Russian Revolution and its far-reaching impact on the Eastern world
Late 20th century —— Materialism peaks, accelerating decline of human spiritual consciousness
Early 21st century —— Ahriman (demonic entity) incarnates in human form in the Western world
Third millennium —— Humanity enters the 'Age of Light', gradual awakening of spiritual consciousness
sourceList: Prophecies compiled from Steiner's published lectures and writings, primarily from the Rudolf Steiner Archive (rsarchive.org)
Selected lecture references from works including 'An Outline of Occult Science' and 'How to Know Higher Worlds' (Bibliography)
Verification based on public news reports, historical records, and academic research
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus
Site icon: Rose Cross symbol — Steiner was deeply influenced by the Rosicrucian tradition, and the Rose Cross is the most representative spiritual symbol of Anthroposophy
